completedItems: Director summary uses E01 AppDataService real aggregation for children, teachers, today's records, health abnormal records, meal records, growth records, unresolved feedback, high-risk consultations, reminders, class stats, recent 7-day trend, and current-week trend.
Trend API supports timeRange, classId, childId, metric, and windowDays with scoped zero-series empty state.
Added admin quality metrics API from the same aggregation source.
Weekly report creation stores server-generated payload/sourceRecordIds through /api/weekly-reports.
Weekly report list/detail/PATCH/archive/export/share routes are implemented.
Director weekly report workspace supports save, history, detail, export, share, archive, and archived-history view.
Report scope access is centralized through lib/server/scope.ts helpers.
E03 Node service tests and Playwright/API acceptance test were added.
remainingItems: External PDF export service is still outside MVP.
External/public share service is still outside MVP.
Full feature:smoke still has old non-E03 failures and one old D08 visual-only disabled-control assertion that conflicts with opened E03 export/share controls.
lint/build remain blocked by pre-existing app/teacher/agent/page.tsx issues outside E03 scope.
fixedFindings: C12-002 weekly report export/share actions opened for saved weekly reports.
C12-005 director health/diet/growth summary now has service-side aggregation.
C15-011 weekly report has persistent save/list/detail chain.
C20-010 trend query has stable Next API fallback.
C20-014 weekly report save/archive/share APIs implemented.
C22-015 weekly report export/share/detail gaps reduced to MVP.
C23-007 real empty/zero trend state is represented with sparse dataQuality.

risks: Current dev server on localhost:3000 was reused because .next/dev/lock prevented Playwright config from starting a fresh server.
Old D08 visual-only smoke expects disabled controls on admin dashboard, while E03 intentionally opens weekly export/share controls.
Existing teacher agent page errors block repository-wide lint/build until the E04/E08 conflict is resolved.
notes: E03 feature implementation and targeted verification are complete; repository-wide status is partial because mandatory global checks are blocked by pre-existing non-E03 failures.
